channel.title: Generative AI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Generative AI on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Google DeepMind & A24: AI's Future in Movie Making
item.description: Google invests $75M in A24 to pioneer AI-driven filmmaking tools, merging DeepMind's tech with indie storytelling innovation.

item.title: OpenAI & Getty Images Deal: AI Search Revolution
item.description: OpenAI partners with Getty Images to integrate licensed visuals into ChatGPT, reshaping AI search ethics and copyright practices.
